raw: Please check hours for each location on PaddleBoston's website - boat launches are weather permitting. The pass is valid for one boat rental. Passholder must present pass and photo ID at rental desk. This includes: Any type of single kayak or paddleboard (1 person), double kayaks (2 adults), standard canoes (up to 3 adults, or 2 adults and 2 children), and XL canoes (up to 5 adults). Save time by filling out your waiver ahead of time: paddleboston.com/waiver. Valid at all seven locations: Stoneham, Medford, Somerville, Boston, Cambridge, Newton, Waltham.
